steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The “but are also” reveals the sentence needs a word expressing how noneconomic factors shape location choices.

steps.title: Match the causal relationship
steps.content: ”Mediated by” means shaped or determined by—exactly what's needed to show noneconomic factors influence residential choices. The other three suggest swapping, separation, or temporal precedence. That matches choice B — B is correct.
